text.title: Google Shopping Ads Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the methodology applied to a realistic scenario, including the produced artefact.

example.description: Faion ecom Shopping: feed health 92%, 3 priority tiers, product groups by margin tag, negatives applied, ROAS 4.5/2.8/1.6.
example.note: Feed health gate cleared; 3-tier priority; partitioned product groups; negatives applied.
